user.title: Connect to FreshTomato Router
user.description:
Enter the connection details for your FreshTomato router.

To find your **HTTP ID**: log in to the router admin UI, open any page, and search the page source for `http_id`. It looks like a random 8-character string.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the router. Check the IP address and port.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check username, password, and HTTP ID.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.
